description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on every push to any branch and on every pull request to any branch. The workflow has four jobs: macos, macos_universal, win32, and win64. Each job checks out the repository, sets up a cache, and installs dependencies. The macos job builds on macOS 10.15, the macos_universal job builds on macOS 10.15 with Xcode 12.3, and the win32 and win64 jobs build on Ubuntu 20.04 with WineHQ.
